        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",

        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 38,

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.40",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 39,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.46",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.47",
        "latex": "\\mu\\mid(\\mathbf{x},\\sigma^{2})\\sim\\mathrm{N}\\left(\\mu_{*},\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.47",

        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.50",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\lambda^{-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 49,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "k",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.53",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.54",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 53,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.55",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.55",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.16",
        "latex": "\\int_{\\widehat{\\theta}}^{+\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\int_{-\\infty}^{\\widehat{\\theta}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\frac{1}{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.16",

          "d",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.17",
        "latex": "\\int_{L_{\\alpha/2}}^{H_{\\alpha/2}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=1-\\alpha",
        "label": "Formula A2.17",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.18",
        "latex": "\\Pr(\\theta>\\theta_{0})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\qquad and\\qquad\\Pr(\\theta_{0}<\\theta<\\theta_{1})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\theta_{1}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta",
        "label": "Formula A2.18",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.19",
        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 18,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",

        "position": 20,

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",

        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",

        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",

        "symbols_defined": [

        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",

        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",

        "position": 25,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",

      {

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",

        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\sigma",
          "i",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]

      {

        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.39",

        "label": "Formula A2.40",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",

          "\\sigma",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

      {

        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",

        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",

      {

      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

      {

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.57",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 56,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.59",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.60",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",

      {

        "latex": "\\Pr(\\theta>\\theta_{0})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\qquad and\\qquad\\Pr(\\theta_{0}<\\theta<\\theta_{1})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\theta_{1}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta",
        "label": "Formula A2.18",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 17,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Pr",
          "\\theta"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.19",
        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 18,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",
        "label": "Formula A2.29",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "Diffuse Priors",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",
        "latex": "p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=C\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.30",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "Diffuse Priors",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.31",
        "latex": "I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=-E\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.31",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "I",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.32",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)\\propto\\sqrt{I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.32",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.33",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Theta",
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{I}",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "i",
          "j"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.34",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})\\propto\\sqrt{\\det[\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})]}",
        "label": "Formula A2.34",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Theta",
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.40",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\propto g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.40",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 39,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.46",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.47",
        "latex": "\\mu\\mid(\\mathbf{x},\\sigma^{2})\\sim\\mathrm{N}\\left(\\mu_{*},\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.47",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.50",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\lambda^{-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 49,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "k",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 51,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha",
          "\\beta",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.53",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}",
        "label": "Formula A2.53",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 52,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.54",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 53,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.55",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.55",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 55,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.57",
        "latex": "\\alpha=\\frac{\\mu_{x}^{2}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}\\qquad and\\qquad\\beta=\\frac{\\mu_{x}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.57",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 56,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.59",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 58,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.60",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "n",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.61",
        "latex": "p(x)\\propto x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.61",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 60,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.62",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{-(\\alpha+1)}e^{-\\beta/x}\\quad for\\alpha,\\beta,x>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.62",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 61,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.63",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\beta}{\\alpha-1}\\quad for\\alpha>1\\quad and\\quad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\beta^{2}}{(\\alpha-1)^{2}(\\alpha-2)}\\quad for\\alpha>2",
        "label": "Formula A2.63",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 62,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.64",

        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",
        "label": "Formula A2.29",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "Diffuse Priors",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",
        "latex": "p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=C\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.30",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "Diffuse Priors",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.31",
        "latex": "I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=-E\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.31",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "I",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.32",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)\\propto\\sqrt{I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.32",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.33",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Theta",
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{I}",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "i",
          "j"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.34",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})\\propto\\sqrt{\\det[\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})]}",
        "label": "Formula A2.34",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.40",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\propto g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.40",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 39,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.46",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.47",
        "latex": "\\mu\\mid(\\mathbf{x},\\sigma^{2})\\sim\\mathrm{N}\\left(\\mu_{*},\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.47",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "p",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.50",

        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 49,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "k",
          "p",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",

        ]

      {

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.54",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 53,

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.55",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.55",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.57",
        "latex": "\\alpha=\\frac{\\mu_{x}^{2}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}\\qquad and\\qquad\\beta=\\frac{\\mu_{x}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.57",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 56,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.59",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 58,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.60",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.61",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{-(\\alpha+1)}e^{-\\beta/x}\\quad for\\alpha,\\beta,x>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.62",

      {

        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\beta}{\\alpha-1}\\quad for\\alpha>1\\quad and\\quad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\beta^{2}}{(\\alpha-1)^{2}(\\alpha-2)}\\quad for\\alpha>2",
        "label": "Formula A2.63",

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.64",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 63,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{-(n/2+1)}e^{-1/(2x)}",
        "label": "Formula A2.65",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.66",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{1}{n-2}\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{2}{(n-2)^{2}(n-4)}",

nearby_text: With a binomial, each trial (observation) has two possible outcomes and the likelihood is a function of the sample size (number of trials), $ n $, and a single success probability, $ p $ (as the two outcomes on any given trial have probabilities of $ p $ and $ 1 - p $). The generalization of this model is the multinomial distribution, where now each trial has $ k $ possible outcomes, and which requires $ k - 1 $ success probabilities to describe the likelihood. In particular, for a total of $ n $ observations, the probability that $ n_1 $ are in category 1, $ n_2 $ in category 2, $ \cdots $, and $ n_k $ in category $ k $ is

        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,

          "i",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",

        ]
      },

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.33",

      {

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",

        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.43",

        ]

      {

        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.45",

        "label": "Formula A2.46",

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.49",

        "label": "Formula A2.51",

        "label": "Formula A2.52",

      {

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",

      {

        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",

        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",

        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{1}{n-2}\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{2}{(n-2)^{2}(n-4)}",

  "nearby_text": "With a binomial, each trial (observation) has two possible outcomes and the likelihood is a function of the sample size (number of trials), $ n $, and a single success probability, $ p $ (as the two outcomes on any given trial have probabilities of $ p $ and $ 1 - p $). The generalization of this model is the multinomial distribution, where now each trial has $ k $ possible outcomes, and which requires $ k - 1 $ success probabilities to describe the likelihood. In particular, for a total of $ n $ observations, the probability that $ n_1 $ are in category 1, $ n_2 $ in category 2, $ \\cdots $, and $ n_k $ in category $ k $ is"
}

        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",

        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",

        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",

        "label": "Formula A2.30",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",

      },
      {

        "latex": "I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=-E\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.31",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",

          "\\mathbf{x}",

        "label": "Formula A2.32",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.33",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Theta",
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{I}",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "i",
          "j"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.34",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})\\propto\\sqrt{\\det[\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})]}",
        "label": "Formula A2.34",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.40",
