      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,

        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.47",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",

      {

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.54",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

      {

        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 54,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",

      {

        "latex": "\\alpha=\\frac{\\mu_{x}^{2}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}\\qquad and\\qquad\\beta=\\frac{\\mu_{x}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.57",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 56,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.59",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.60",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        ]

      },
      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{-(\\alpha+1)}e^{-\\beta/x}\\quad for\\alpha,\\beta,x>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.62",

      {

        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\beta}{\\alpha-1}\\quad for\\alpha>1\\quad and\\quad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\beta^{2}}{(\\alpha-1)^{2}(\\alpha-2)}\\quad for\\alpha>2",
        "label": "Formula A2.63",

        ]
      },
      {

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.65",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{-(n/2+1)}e^{-1/(2x)}",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.18",
        "latex": "\\Pr(\\theta>\\theta_{0})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\qquad and\\qquad\\Pr(\\theta_{0}<\\theta<\\theta_{1})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\theta_{1}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta",
        "label": "Formula A2.18",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.19",
        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 18,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",
        "latex": "p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=C\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.30",

      {

        "latex": "I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=-E\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.31",

        "label": "Formula A2.32",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.33",

        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\mathbf{I}",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "i",
          "j"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.34",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})\\propto\\sqrt{\\det[\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})]}",
        "label": "Formula A2.34",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",

        "label": "Formula A2.39",

        "label": "Formula A2.40",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",

          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,

        ]

        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [

      {

        "label": "Formula A2.47",

        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {

        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        ]

      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",

      {

      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

      {

        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.57",
        "latex": "\\alpha=\\frac{\\mu_{x}^{2}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}\\qquad and\\qquad\\beta=\\frac{\\mu_{x}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.57",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 56,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.59",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.60",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        ]

      },
      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{-(\\alpha+1)}e^{-\\beta/x}\\quad for\\alpha,\\beta,x>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.62",

      {

        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\beta}{\\alpha-1}\\quad for\\alpha>1\\quad and\\quad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\beta^{2}}{(\\alpha-1)^{2}(\\alpha-2)}\\quad for\\alpha>2",
        "label": "Formula A2.63",

label: Formula A2.87
nearby_text: At first glance, this looks like the multinomial density function (with $ \alpha_i - 1 = n_i $). The difference is that the multinomial is calculated over a set of discrete random variables ($ n_i $), thus returning the expected probabilities for any vector of discrete numbers of counts (successes) in each category. Conversely, the Dirichlet treats an equivalent of the vector of outcomes (generalized to non-integers) as fixed and returns the continuous distribution for all possible configurations of the success parameters given this data, which means that the data ($ \alpha_i $) is fixed, and the success parameters ($ x_i $) are random. A few key moments of this distribution are

        "position": 13,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.15",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\boldsymbol{\\theta}}=\\boldsymbol{E}[\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x}]=\\int\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\boldsymbol{p}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\boldsymbol{\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.15",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "position": 14,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widehat{\\boldsymbol}",
          "\\widehat{\\theta}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.16",
        "latex": "\\int_{\\widehat{\\theta}}^{+\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\int_{-\\infty}^{\\widehat{\\theta}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\frac{1}{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.16",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "position": 15,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "\\widehat{\\theta}",
          "d",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.17",
        "latex": "\\int_{L_{\\alpha/2}}^{H_{\\alpha/2}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=1-\\alpha",
        "label": "Formula A2.17",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Highest Density Regions (HDRs)",
        "position": 16,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\alpha",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "d",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.18",
        "latex": "\\Pr(\\theta>\\theta_{0})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\qquad and\\qquad\\Pr(\\theta_{0}<\\theta<\\theta_{1})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\theta_{1}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta",
        "label": "Formula A2.18",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 17,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Pr",
          "\\theta"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.19",
        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 18,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",
        "label": "Formula A2.29",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "Diffuse Priors",
        "position": 28,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",
        "latex": "p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=C\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.30",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "Diffuse Priors",
        "position": 29,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.31",
        "latex": "I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=-E\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.31",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 30,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "I",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\theta"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.32",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)\\propto\\sqrt{I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.32",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 31,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.33",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 32,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Theta",
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{I}",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "i",
          "j"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.34",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})\\propto\\sqrt{\\det[\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})]}",
        "label": "Formula A2.34",
        "section": "THE CHOICE OF A PRIOR",
        "subsection": "The Jeffreys Prior",
        "position": 33,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Theta",
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.40",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\propto g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.40",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 39,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.46",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.47",
        "latex": "\\mu\\mid(\\mathbf{x},\\sigma^{2})\\sim\\mathrm{N}\\left(\\mu_{*},\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.47",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.50",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\lambda^{-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 49,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "k",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 51,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha",
          "\\beta",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.53",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}",
        "label": "Formula A2.53",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 52,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.54",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 53,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha",
          "\\lambda",
          "p",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.55",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.55",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 55,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.57",
        "latex": "\\alpha=\\frac{\\mu_{x}^{2}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}\\qquad and\\qquad\\beta=\\frac{\\mu_{x}}{\\sigma_{x}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.57",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 56,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.58",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha)=\\int_{0}^{\\infty}y^{\\alpha-1}e^{-y}d y\\qquad for\\alpha>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.58",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.59",
        "latex": "\\Gamma(\\alpha+1)=\\alpha\\Gamma(\\alpha),\\quad\\Gamma(1)=1,\\quad and\\quad\\Gamma(1/2)=\\sqrt{\\pi}",
        "label": "Formula A2.59",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 58,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Gamma",
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.60",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid n)=\\frac{2^{-n/2}}{\\Gamma(n/2)}x^{n/2-1}e^{-x/2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.60",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 59,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "p",

        ]

  "nearby_text": "At first glance, this looks like the multinomial density function (with $ \\alpha_i - 1 = n_i $). The difference is that the multinomial is calculated over a set of discrete random variables ($ n_i $), thus returning the expected probabilities for any vector of discrete numbers of counts (successes) in each category. Conversely, the Dirichlet treats an equivalent of the vector of outcomes (generalized to non-integers) as fixed and returns the continuous distribution for all possible configurations of the success parameters given this data, which means that the data ($ \\alpha_i $) is fixed, and the success parameters ($ x_i $) are random. A few key moments of this distribution are"
}

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.15",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\boldsymbol{\\theta}}=\\boldsymbol{E}[\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x}]=\\int\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\boldsymbol{p}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\boldsymbol{\\theta}",

        "latex": "\\int_{\\widehat{\\theta}}^{+\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\int_{-\\infty}^{\\widehat{\\theta}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\frac{1}{2}",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.17",
        "latex": "\\int_{L_{\\alpha/2}}^{H_{\\alpha/2}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=1-\\alpha",
        "label": "Formula A2.17",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.18",
        "latex": "\\Pr(\\theta>\\theta_{0})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\qquad and\\qquad\\Pr(\\theta_{0}<\\theta<\\theta_{1})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\theta_{1}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta",
        "label": "Formula A2.18",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.19",
        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",

        "position": 18,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",

        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\propto g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.40",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.46",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.47",
        "latex": "\\mu\\mid(\\mathbf{x},\\sigma^{2})\\sim\\mathrm{N}\\left(\\mu_{*},\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.47",

        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.50",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\lambda^{-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "p",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^\\alpha}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-\\beta x}\\quad{\\rm for}\\alpha,\\beta,x>0\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.52",

      {

      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)=\\frac{\\lambda^{-\\alpha}}{\\Gamma(\\alpha)}x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.54",

      {

        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\alpha,\\lambda)\\propto x^{\\alpha-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.55",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 54,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.56",
        "latex": "\\mu_{x}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta}=\\alpha\\lambda\\qquad and\\qquad\\sigma_{x}^{2}=\\frac{\\alpha}{\\beta^{2}}=\\alpha\\lambda^{2}",
        "label": "Formula A2.56",

        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",

      },

nearby_text: An important special case of the Dirichlet (for k = 2 classes) is the beta distribution, whose pdf is given by which has a mean and a variance of As [[SEE_FIGURE:A2.3]] illustrates, the beta distribution is extremely flexible, and can be flat, unimodal, U-, or L-shaped, depending on the choice of $ \alpha $ and $ \beta $.

        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})}{p(\\mathbf{x})}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})}{\\int p(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta})d\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.14",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}=\\max_{\\theta}\\left[p(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\right]",

          "\\widehat{\\theta}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.15",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\boldsymbol{\\theta}}=\\boldsymbol{E}[\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x}]=\\int\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\boldsymbol{p}(\\boldsymbol{\\theta}\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\boldsymbol{\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.15",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.16",
        "latex": "\\int_{\\widehat{\\theta}}^{+\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\int_{-\\infty}^{\\widehat{\\theta}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=\\frac{1}{2}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.17",
        "latex": "\\int_{L_{\\alpha/2}}^{H_{\\alpha/2}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta=1-\\alpha",
        "label": "Formula A2.17",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.18",
        "latex": "\\Pr(\\theta>\\theta_{0})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\infty}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\qquad and\\qquad\\Pr(\\theta_{0}<\\theta<\\theta_{1})=\\int_{\\theta_{0}}^{\\theta_{1}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta",
        "label": "Formula A2.18",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",

        "position": 17,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.19",
        "latex": "p_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\qquad and\\qquad p_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.19",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 18,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.20",
        "latex": "\\pi_{0}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0})\\qquad and\\qquad\\pi_{1}=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1})",
        "label": "Formula A2.20",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 19,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.21",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}/p_{1}}{\\pi_{0}/\\pi_{1}}=\\frac{p_{0}\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}\\pi_{0}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.21",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.22",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p_{0}(1-\\pi_{0})}{\\pi_{0}(1-p_{0})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.22",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.23",
        "latex": "p_{i}\\propto p(\\theta_{i})p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})=\\pi_{i}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{i})\\quad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.23",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.24",
        "latex": "\\frac{p_{0}}{p_{1}}=\\frac{\\pi_{0}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{\\pi_{1}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.24",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 23,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.25",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\frac{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{0})}{p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta_{1})}",
        "label": "Formula A2.25",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.26",
        "latex": "p_{i}(\\theta)=p(\\theta)/\\pi_{i}\\qquad for\\quad i=0,1",
        "label": "Formula A2.26",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.27",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p_{i}&=\\Pr(\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})d\\theta\\\\&=\\frac{1}{p(\\mathbf{x})}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\theta)p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)d\\theta\\\\&=\\pi_{i}\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{i}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{i}(\\theta)d\\theta\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.27",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i",
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.28",
        "latex": "B_{0}=\\left(\\frac{p_{0}}{\\pi_{0}}\\right)\\left(\\frac{\\pi_{1}}{p_{1}}\\right)=\\frac{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{0}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{0}(\\theta)d\\theta}{\\int_{\\theta\\in\\Theta_{1}}p(\\mathbf{x}\\mid\\theta)p_{1}(\\theta)d\\theta}",
        "label": "Formula A2.28",
        "section": "SUMMARIZING THE POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTION",
        "subsection": "Bayes Factors and Hypothesis Testing",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "B"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.29",
        "latex": "p(\\theta)=\\frac{1}{b-a}\\qquad for\\qquad a\\leq\\theta\\leq b",
        "label": "Formula A2.29",

        "position": 28,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.30",
        "latex": "p(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=C\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})",
        "label": "Formula A2.30",

      {
        "id": "formula_A2.31",
        "latex": "I(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})=-E\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\theta\\mid\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.31",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.33",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{I}(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})_{i j}=-E_{x}\\left[\\frac{\\partial^{2}\\ln\\ell(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}|\\mathbf{x})}{\\partial\\theta_{i}\\partial\\theta_{j}}\\right]",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.34",

        "label": "Formula A2.34",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.35",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu,\\sigma^{2}\\mid x_{i})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.35",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",

        "position": 34,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\sigma",
          "i",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.36",
        "latex": "\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\sum_{i=1}^{n}\\frac{(x_{i}-\\mu)^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.36",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 35,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{x}",
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.37",
        "latex": "=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma^{2}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.37",
        "section": "Appendix: Introduction",
        "subsection": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "position": 36,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\pi"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.38",
        "latex": "p(\\mu)=\\frac{1}{\\sqrt{2\\pi\\sigma_{0}^{2}}}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.38",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 37,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.39",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})=f(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\cdot g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.39",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",

        "position": 38,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.40",
        "latex": "p(\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1})\\propto g(\\mathbf{x},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{1},\\boldsymbol{\\Theta}_{2})",
        "label": "Formula A2.40",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 39,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula A2.41",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 40,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "i"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.42",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{\\mu n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}-\\frac{n\\mu^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.42",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 41,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.43",
        "latex": "-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{2}\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)+\\mu\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)=-\\frac{\\mu^{2}}{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+\\frac{2\\mu\\mu_{*}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula A2.43",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 42,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu",
          "\\overline{x}",
          "\\sigma",
          "n"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.44",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.44",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 43,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.45",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}+f(\\mathbf{x},\\mu_{0},\\sigma^{2},\\sigma_{0}^{2})\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.45",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 44,
        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.46",
        "latex": "p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{*})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{*}^{2}}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula A2.46",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 45,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "p"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.47",
        "latex": "\\mu\\mid(\\mathbf{x},\\sigma^{2})\\sim\\mathrm{N}\\left(\\mu_{*},\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\right)",
        "label": "Formula A2.47",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 46,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.48",
        "latex": "\\mu_{*}=\\mu_{0}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\overline{x}\\frac{\\sigma_{*}^{2}}{\\sigma^{2}/n}",
        "label": "Formula A2.48",

        "subsection": "Gaussian Likelihood With Known Variance and Unknown Mean",
        "position": 47,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.49",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\beta e^{-\\beta x}\\quad for\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty,\\quad\\beta>0",
        "label": "Formula A2.49",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 48,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.50",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid\\beta)=\\lambda^{-1}e^{-x/\\lambda}",
        "label": "Formula A2.50",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 49,

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.51",
        "latex": "p(x\\mid k,\\beta)=\\frac{\\beta^{k}}{(k-1)!}\\; x^{k-1}\\; e^{-\\beta x}\\quad\\mathrm{f o r}\\quad0\\leq x<\\infty",
        "label": "Formula A2.51",
        "section": "POSTERIOR DISTRIBUTIONS UNDER NORMALITY ASSUMPTIONS",
        "subsection": "Gamma, $ \\chi^{2} $, Inverse-gamma, and $ \\chi^{-2} $ Distributions",
        "position": 50,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\beta",
          "k",
          "p",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.52",

        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(\\sigma^{2}\\mid\\mathbf{x},\\mu)&\\propto(\\sigma^{2})^{-n/2}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{nS^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)(\\sigma^{2})^{-\\nu_{0}/2-1}\\cdot\\exp\\left(-\\frac{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)\\\\&=(\\sigma^{2})^{-(n+\\nu_{0})/2-1}\\exp\\left(-\\frac{nS^{2}+\\sigma_{0}^{2}}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\right)\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.71",

        "latex": "p(n_{1},\\cdots n_{k})=\\frac{n!}{n_{1}!n_{2}!\\cdots n_{k}!}\\ p_{1}^{n_{1}}\\cdots p_{k}^{n_{k}}\\quad where\\quad\\sum_{i}n_{i}=n\\quad and\\quad\\sum_{i}p_{i}=1",

      {

        "latex": "\\begin{align*}p(x_1,\\cdots x_k\\mid\\alpha_1,\\cdots,\\alpha_k)=\\frac{\\Gamma(\\alpha_0)}{\\Gamma(\\alpha_1)\\cdots\\Gamma(\\alpha_k)}x_1^{\\alpha_1-1}\\cdots x_k^{\\alpha_k-1}\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.85",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.86",
        "latex": "\\alpha_{0}=\\sum_{i=1}^{k}\\alpha_{i}\\quad with\\quad\\alpha_{i}>0,\\quad and\\quad\\sum_{i=1}^{k}x_{i}=1\\quad with\\quad0\\leq x_{i}\\leq1",
        "label": "Formula A2.86",
        "section": "CONJUGATE PRIORS",
        "subsection": "The Beta and Dirichlet Distributions",
        "position": 85,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\alpha"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_A2.87",
        "latex": "\\begin{align*}\\mu_{x_i}={\\alpha_i\\over\\alpha_0},\\quad\\sigma^2(x_i)={\\alpha_i(\\alpha_0-\\alpha_i)\\over\\alpha_0^2(\\alpha_0+1)},\\quad{\\rm and}\\quad\\sigma(x_i,x_j)=-{\\alpha_i\\alpha_j\\over\\alpha_0^2(\\alpha_0+1)}\\end{align*}",
        "label": "Formula A2.87",
        "section": "CONJUGATE PRIORS",
        "subsection": "The Beta and Dirichlet Distributions",

        "symbols_defined": [

        "label": "Formula A2.88",

  "nearby_text": "An important special case of the Dirichlet (for k = 2 classes) is the beta distribution, whose pdf is given by which has a mean and a variance of As [[SEE_FIGURE:A2.3]] illustrates, the beta distribution is extremely flexible, and can be flat, unimodal, U-, or L-shaped, depending on the choice of $ \\alpha $ and $ \\beta $."
}

label: Formula A2.90
nearby_text: The Wishart distribution can be thought of as the multivariate extension of the $ \chi^2 $ distribution. Suppose $ \mathbf{x}_1, \cdots, \mathbf{x}_n $ are independent and identically distributed vectors, with $ \mathbf{x}_i \sim \text{MVN}_k(\mathbf{0}, \mathbf{V}) $. Using these $ n $ draws, and assuming that the mean is known to be zero, the resulting random $ (k \times k \text{ symmetric, positive definite}) $ sample covariance matrix, $ \mathbf{W} $, is given by This sum is defined as a Wishart distribution with $n$ degrees of freedom and a (matrix) parameter $\mathbf{V}$. Recalling that the sum of $n$ squared unit normals follows a $\chi_n^2$ distribution, the Wishart is the extension to the multivariate normal. Indeed, for $k=1$ with $\mathbf{V}=(1)$, the Wishart is simply a $\chi_n^2$ distribution, as $\sum x_i^2 \sim \chi_n^2$, because $x_i \sim N(0,1)$.

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mu"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "The Wishart distribution can be thought of as the multivariate extension of the $ \\chi^2 $ distribution. Suppose $ \\mathbf{x}_1, \\cdots, \\mathbf{x}_n $ are independent and identically distributed vectors, with $ \\mathbf{x}_i \\sim \\text{MVN}_k(\\mathbf{0}, \\mathbf{V}) $. Using these $ n $ draws, and assuming that the mean is known to be zero, the resulting random $ (k \\times k \\text{ symmetric, positive definite}) $ sample covariance matrix, $ \\mathbf{W} $, is given by This sum is defined as a Wishart distribution with $n$ degrees of freedom and a (matrix) parameter $\\mathbf{V}$. Recalling that the sum of $n$ squared unit normals follows a $\\chi_n^2$ distribution, the Wishart is the extension to the multivariate normal. Indeed, for $k=1$ with $\\mathbf{V}=(1)$, the Wishart is simply a $\\chi_n^2$ distribution, as $\\sum x_i^2 \\sim \\chi_n^2$, because $x_i \\sim N(0,1)$."
}

label: Formula A2.91
nearby_text: The Wishart is the sampling distribution for covariance matrices (just like the $ \chi^{2} $ is associated with the distribution of a sample variance for data drawn from a normal; Chapter 11). The pdf of the Wishart distribution is Recall that the trace (tr) of a matrix is just the sum of its diagonal elements, $ \mathrm{tr}(\mathbf{A}) = \sum A_{ii} $ (Appendix 5). Odell and Feiveson (1966) presented an algorithm for generating random draws from the Wishart.

        "id": "formula_A2.41",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}p(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})&\\propto\\ell(\\mu\\mid\\mathbf{x})\\cdot p(\\mu)\\\\&\\propto\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(\\mu-\\mu_{0})^{2}}{2\\sigma_{0}^{2}}-\\frac{1}{2\\sigma^{2}}\\left(\\sum_{i=1}^{n}x_{i}^{2}-2\\mu n\\overline{x}+n\\mu^{2}\\right)\\right]\\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "\\sigma_{*}^{2}=\\left(\\frac{1}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)^{-1}\\quad and\\quad\\mu_{*}=\\sigma_{*}^{2}\\left(\\frac{\\mu_{0}}{\\sigma_{0}^{2}}+\\frac{n\\overline{x}}{\\sigma^{2}}\\right)",
